mapper.select: SELECT target_date AS targetDate, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'INCOME' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS totalIncome, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'EXPENSE' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS totalExpense FROM finances WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND target_date LIKE CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '%') GROUP BY target_date ORDER BY target_date ASC
